name: onboarding_question_mid_collection_then_resume
notes: Owner asks a genuine how-does-this-work question DURING initial profile collection (distinct from topic_switch_and_return.json, which detours at the READY_ASKED paced-flow beat on a COMPLETE journey) — the turn-brain system prompt: 'If the owner asks YOU a question, answer it briefly first, then gently steer back to what is still needed.' Setup: `setup --owner-inputs true --journey` (ACTIVE journey, 2-entry queue: confirm business_type='sweets' + gap 'about') then `script <tenant> onboarding_question_mid_collection_then_resume.json`.

steps.message: haan sahi hai, hum Probe Handicrafts hain, Jaipur mein handicrafts bechte hain
steps.note: Confirms the business_type guess AND volunteers the business name + city in the same message.

steps.message: ek second — iske liye kya mujhe alag se WhatsApp Business number lena padega?
steps.note: A genuine setup question mid-collection (do I need a separate WhatsApp Business number). Expect a real, substantive answer — not a canned re-prompt of the pending profile question, not deflection.

steps.message: theek hai samajh gaya, chalo aage badho
assert_not_contains: which city is your business in
steps.note: Resume signal after the question was answered. Expect the profile-collection walk to continue from where it left off — no re-ask of the name/city just given, no restart from question 1.
